author: Robby Sneiderman
name: Sequential TTT + Global Cosine Schedule + Memorization Analysis
blurb: SwiGLU MLP, EMA, int5 quantization, 5-epoch sequential score-then-train TTT with global cosine LR decay and per-layer LR multipliers. Reports sliding-window BPB on TTT-adapted weights (1.0028) verified via memorization diagnostic (sliding < TTT-loop). Reproduced across two independent hardware instances (1.0022, 1.0028).
